name: Grant Memorial Park
description: Grant Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Washburn, IL. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Washburn Illinois
description: Washburn Illinois is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cazenovia, IL. There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll need to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to lights.
